essence: Manages woodlands through planting, thinning, and habitat management to support timber production and biodiversity.

identity.title: Forestry Worker
identity.summary: Performs tree felling, planting, and woodland maintenance tasks while following safety and environmental guidelines.

salary.notes: Qualified arborists and machine operators can earn higher wages.

qualifications: Experience in forestry, arboriculture, or countryside management
Knowledge of woodland ecology and safety practices

lifestyle.description: Outdoor, physical work with seasonal variation; often remote sites and use of heavy machinery.

habits: Performs planting, thinning, and felling tasks
Records work and follows environmental guidelines
